mapper.select:
select d.id provinceId, d.name provinceName, (select count(*) from t_prison p where p.dept_id = d.id and p.is_deleted=0) as totalPrisons, (select count(*) from t_device de left join t_prison p on p.id = de.prison_id where p.dept_id = d.id and de.is_deleted=0 and p.is_deleted=0) as totalDevices from sys_dept d
parent_id = 1
and d.id in
#{id}
and d.id = -1
select distinct d.id from sys_dept d inner join sys_user_area sua on d.id = sua.area_id inner join sys_user u on u.id = sua.user_id where u.id = #{userId}

select d.id provinceId, d.name provinceName, (select count(*) from t_prison p where p.dept_id = d.id and p.is_deleted=0) as totalPrisons, (select count(*) from t_device de left join t_prison p on p.id = de.prison_id where p.dept_id = d.id and de.is_deleted=0 and p.is_deleted=0) as totalDevices, (select count(*) from t_device de left join t_prison p on p.id = de.prison_id where p.dept_id = d.id and de.is_deleted=0 and p.is_deleted=0 and de.power_off=0) as onlineDevices, (select count(*) from t_device de left join t_prison p on p.id = de.prison_id where p.dept_id = d.id and de.is_deleted=0 and p.is_deleted=0 and de.power_off=1) as offlineDevices, (select count(*) from t_alarm a left join t_prison p on p.id = a.prison_id where p.dept_id = d.id and a.is_deleted=0 and p.is_deleted=0) as totalAlarms from sys_dept d where parent_id = 1 and d.id = #{provinceId}

select p.id,p.name,p.level, (select count(*) from t_building b where b.prison_id = p.id and b.is_deleted = 0) as buildingNum, (select count(*) from t_device d where d.prison_id = p.id and d.is_deleted = 0) as totalDevices from t_prison p where p.is_deleted=0 and p.dept_id = #{provinceId}
